zh: 哼……那是当然。也不看看我是谁。
en: Hmph... obviously. Do you even know who you're talking to?

zh: 两位的冰粉来了！
en: Here are your iced jelly bowls!

zh: 谢谢老板娘。
en: Thanks, ma'am.

zh: 哇，好好吃！比我之前在市中心吃的那家还要好吃。
en: Wow, this is amazing! Way better than the place I tried downtown.

zh: 嗯，确实不错。
en: Mm, it's really good.

zh: 雨停了。
en: The rain stopped.

zh: 真的哎！太好了，终于可以回去了。
en: Oh, it did! Yes! We can finally head back.

zh: 老板娘，结账。
en: Ma'am, check please.

zh: 一共十六块。
en: That'll be sixteen yuan.

zh: 我来吧。就当是我请你的，谢谢你给我这个工作机会。
en: Let me get this. Call it a thank-you for giving me the gig.

zh: 哼……那好吧。下次我请你吃火锅。
en: Hmph... fine. Next time, hotpot's on me.

zh: 对了，林辰。后天拍摄的时候，你记得带反光板和补光灯。还有，你最好穿黑色的衣服，这样不会在裙子上反光。
en: Oh, and Lin Chen. For the shoot the day after tomorrow, bring a reflector and a fill light. And wear black — I don't want any color cast bouncing onto the dress.

zh: 知道了。你放心，我专业的。
en: Got it. Trust me, I'm a pro.

zh: 哼，最好是这样。要是拍不好，我可是会扣你工资的。
en: Hmph, you'd better be. Mess this up and I'm docking your pay.

zh: 我到了。我住女生宿舍，你就不用送进去了。
en: I'm here. Girls' dorm, so you can stop right there.

zh: 好。那后天下午三点，废弃工厂门口见。
en: Alright. See you at the abandoned factory gate, three PM day after tomorrow.

zh: 嗯。记得别迟到。还有，别忘了带反光板和补光灯。
en: Mm. Don't be late. And don't forget the reflector and fill light.

zh: 知道了，忘不了。
en: Got it, I won't forget.

zh: 那我进去了。拜拜。
en: I'm going in now. Bye.

zh: 哦，对了！林辰。
en: Oh, hey! Lin Chen.

zh: 嗯？怎么了？
en: Hm? What's up?

zh: 今天……谢谢你。陪我找了一下午的拍摄地，还请我吃了冰粉。
en: Today... thanks. For spending the whole afternoon scouting locations with me, and for the iced jelly.

zh: 还有……你拍的照片，真的很好看。
en: And... the photo you took. It's really beautiful.

zh: 你来得挺早的嘛。我还以为你会迟到呢。
en: You're early. I thought you'd be late.

zh: 我从来不迟到。东西都带来了，你看看还缺什么。
en: I'm never late. Brought everything — take a look and see if anything's missing.

zh: 哇，你装备挺齐全的啊。比我之前找的那个摄影师专业多了。
en: Wow, you've got quite the setup. Way more professional than the last photographer I hired.

zh: 那是当然。我们先去换衣服吧，那边有个废弃的值班室，可以当化妆间。
en: Of course. Let's go get changed first — there's an old abandoned guard shack over there we can use as a dressing room.

zh: 那个……实在是你太亮眼了，和这个环境形成的反差感太绝了，我作为设计生一时没忍住。
en: Um... it's just — you stand out so much, the contrast between you and this setting is incredible. As a design student, I couldn't help myself.

zh: 抱歉啊，我是山城大学设计系的林辰。其实我一直很喜欢Lolita风格的设计，冒昧问一句，可以加个好友认识一下吗？
en: Sorry — I'm Lin Chen, design major at Mountain City University. I've always been a big fan of Lolita fashion. Mind if I add you as a friend?

zh: 上来就要好友？你这人还真是直接。
en: Straight to asking for my contact? You don't waste time, do you.

zh: 先把照片给我看看，拍得不好，不光删图，别想再搭话。
en: Let me see the photo first. If it's bad, you're deleting it and we're done talking.

zh: ……没想到构图和光影居然这么到位。
en: ...Didn't expect the composition and lighting to be this on point.

zh: 巧了，我也是山城大学的，大一服装设计。这身裙子就是我自己设计的。
en: Small world — I'm at Mountain City U too, freshman in fashion design. This dress? I made it myself.

zh: （大吃一惊）原来你就是设计师！难怪气质这么特别，和那些只会穿衣服的完全不一样。
en: （completely surprised）So you're the designer! No wonder you carry yourself differently — nothing like those people who just wear the clothes without understanding them.

zh: 看你也算有点审美。正好，我缺摄影师和视觉设计，要不要来帮我做事？顺便……好友也可以加。
en: At least you've got some taste. Lucky for you, I need a photographer and visual designer. Want to work for me? And... I guess I'll add you too.

zh: 课业挺多的，但我可以抽空帮忙。加好友没问题。
en: My schedule's pretty packed, but I can make time to help. Adding you is no problem.

zh: 算你运气好。后续工作细节我微信发你，明天老城区碰面选拍摄地，别迟到。
en: Lucky you. I'll send you the work details on WeChat. Meet tomorrow in the old town to scout locations. Don't be late.

zh: 我说，你夏天穿这么厚不热吗？我看着都替你热。
en: Seriously though, aren't you dying in that thick dress in this heat? Just looking at you makes me sweat.

zh: 体寒还流这么多汗？我看你就是爱美不要命。小心中暑了没人管你。
en: You have poor circulation but you're dripping sweat? You're literally killing yourself for fashion. Heatstroke's gonna get you and nobody's gonna be around to help.

zh: 你少贫嘴！专心找场地。再废话我扣你工资。
en: Less talking, more scouting! Keep running your mouth and I'm cutting your pay.

zh: 这里不行，太普通了。
en: No, this is too boring.

zh: 前面看看。
en: Let's check further ahead.

zh: 这里完美！林辰你眼光可以啊。
en: This is perfect! Lin Chen, you've got a good eye.

zh: 那当然，也不看是谁。
en: Well yeah, who do you think I am?

zh: 臭美。
en: Full of yourself.

zh: 糟糕，下雨了！
en: Oh no, it's raining!

zh: 幸好我带了伞，一起走吧。
en: Good thing I brought an umbrella. Let's share.

zh: 进来躲雨吃碗冰粉吧。
en: Come in, get out of the rain and have some iced jelly.

zh: 这家冰粉真的好好吃。下次我们还来这里吃好不好？
en: This place is seriously good. Can we come here again next time?

zh: 好啊，下次我请你。
en: Sure, next time it's on me.

zh: 谁要你请……我自己有钱。
en: Who said I need you to pay... I've got my own money.

zh: 今天辛苦啦，下次拍摄再联系。
en: Good work today. I'll text you about the next shoot.

zh: 对了，以后不许随便搭讪陌生人，也就我好心理你。
en: And hey — no randomly hitting on strangers from now on. You got lucky I was nice enough to respond.

zh: 知道啦，我的大设计师。以后只搭讪你一个人。
en: Got it, my dear designer. From now on, I'll only hit on you.

zh: 哼，油嘴滑舌。
en: Hmph, smooth talker.

zh: 你居然偷拍我？
en: Did you just take a photo of me without asking?

zh: （瞬间慌乱，手脚无措，说话语无伦次）啊、啊我不是故意的！主要是你长得太好看了，我一时看呆了才拍照的……
en: （panicking instantly, flailing, words all jumbled）Ah—ah I didn't mean to! It's just — you're so beautiful, I completely froze and just... took the picture...

zh: 别生气嘛，就一张照片而已，多大点事。要不……我请你喝东西，交个朋友？
en: Hey don't be mad, it's just one photo, no big deal. How about... I buy you a drink and we get to know each other?

zh: 够了。
en: Enough.

zh: 先是偷拍别人，现在又说这种轻浮的话，真让人不舒服。
en: First you sneak a picture of me, now you're hitting on me like it's nothing. That's just gross.

zh: 不是，我真没有别的意思，你别多想啊！不就是拍张照吗，至于这么生气吗？
en: No, I really didn't mean anything by it, don't overthink it! It's just a photo — why get so worked up over nothing?

zh: 不用解释了。随手偷拍别人，还一副理所当然的样子，**真是个下头男**。
en: Save it. Taking creep shots like it's no big deal, then acting like I'm the problem — **you're disgusting**.

zh: 把照片立刻删掉，以后离我远一点。
en: Delete it right now. And stay away from me from now on.

zh: 对不起……是我失态了。
en: I'm sorry... I overstepped.

zh: 没必要再说了。
en: There's nothing more to say.

zh: 那边的值班室还能用，我去换衣服。你先把设备架好，试一下光。
en: That guard shack over there is still usable. I'm going to change. You set up the gear and test the lighting.

zh: 不许偷看！
en: And don't you peek!

zh: 知道了，我又不是变态。
en: Got it, I'm not a creep.

zh: 看什么看？没见过啊？
en: What are you staring at? Never seen a lolita dress before?

zh: 没什么，就是觉得……比我想象中还要好看。
en: Nothing, just... it's even more beautiful than I imagined.
